signals.raw:
South Korea March 2026 CPI Inflation Confirmed at 2.16% YoY (Up from 2.00% in Feb)** | NO | HIGH confidence[2]

South Korea's inflation rose to 2.16% year-over-year in March 2026 from 2.00% in February, with monthly inflation at 0.34%; data updated April 2, 2026[2]. No breaking announcements today (April 18, 2026) on annual 2026 inflation, which remains unconfirmed beyond partial monthly figures (

signals.headline: US Nears $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
US Nears $20B Deal with Iran to Surrender Uranium Stockpile | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Reports on April 17, 2026, confirm the U.S. is close to a $20 billion agreement for Iran to relinquish its uranium stockpile, with weekend talks anticipated, sparking a broad crypto rally.[4]
